evidence: Agile resonates most with slots tied to adaptability in applying wisdom (experience, comprehension), structural patterns (ontological.structural), and catalyzing change (interconnection.catalytic, symmetry.transformative). Scores reflect its role in individual judgment (scale.individual) and contingent responsiveness (lawfulness.contingent).

The highest scores reflect 'all-knowing' as deeply tied to individual wisdom (scale.individual), understanding of underlying structures (epistemological.understanding), and its essential resonance with core meaning (resonance.essential). It catalyzes transformative change (symmetry.transformative) and transcends ordinary value (value_generation.sacred).

Apt strongly resonates with semantic meaning (10) and essential core (10) as it directly relates to wisdom's essence. It operates at the individual scale (8) and ties to understanding (7) and comprehension (7). Predictable (6) and functional value (7) reflect its reliable utility. Transformative (5) and catalytic (4) scores hint at its potential to influence change through wise judgment.

The word 'born' as an adjective in the context of ABS.wise resonates strongly with temporal emergence (origin of wisdom), permanence (lasting trait), individual scale (inherent to a person), independence (self-contained), essential resonance (core essence), predictable lawfulness (inherent nature), comprehension (deep understanding from wisdom), and functional/ethical value (practical and moral benefits). Scores are low elsewhere as the focus is on innate, enduring wisdom tied to the individual's essence.

Brainy resonates strongest with individual-scale wisdom (8), semantic meaning (5), and functional utility (4). Moderate scores reflect its ties to lived experience (3), predictability (2), and transformative influence (1). Scores are low elsewhere due to its focus on personal knowledge rather than systemic or existential dimensions.

The highest scores reflect 'bright' as a marker of deep comprehension (experience.comprehension), the semantic layer of meaning (ontological.semantic), and the enduring influence of wisdom (temporal.influence/continuation). Its catalytic effect (interconnection.catalytic) and transformative potential (symmetry.transformative) tie to how wisdom shapes decisions and understanding over time.
